items.title: 8-K — Other Events
items.headline_ai: Firsthand Technology reports Q3 results, NAV falls to $0.04 per share
items.snippet: Firsthand Technology Value Fund's net assets dropped to $296,547, or $0.04/share, as of September 30, 2025, down from $0.11/share in June.
